rationale: This is a classic "Thief Puzzle / Hero Wars"-style stick-figure fail skit — visually (flat 2D stick art, beige/yellow palette) and tonally (slapstick fail humor) it clashes hard with Bounce Blast's calm, moody 3D abstract physics aesthetic and its 25-55 relaxed-puzzler audience. The mechanic mismatch is the biggest blocker: there's no pull-pin/draw-line/save-the-character logic in the core loop, so the hook would be misleading and tank D1/D7 retention even if CTR spiked. Skip this archetype, or only test as a heavily reworked "satisfying chain-reaction fail-then-win" variant that actually shows the block-place-to-ball-bounce loop.
